description: FDSN Seismology source catalog for the fdsn-seismology feeder. Each entry is an FDSN Event web-service node. Select nodes with the existing FDSN_NODES include list and FDSN_EXCLUDE_NODES deny list; when FDSN_NODES is unset, every entry whose 'enabled' flag is true is polled, and FDSN_EXCLUDE_NODES subtracts from that default set. Point FDSN_SOURCES_FILE at a copy of this file to maintain your own catalog. Secrets or private endpoint fragments may be written as ${ENV_VAR} and are expanded from the environment at load time.

sources.name: emsc
sources.description: European-Mediterranean Seismological Centre global aggregator FDSN Event service.

sources.name: gfz
sources.description: GFZ GEOFON global M4+ FDSN Event service.
sources.display_name: GFZ German Research Centre for Geosciences (GEOFON)

sources.name: ingv
sources.description: INGV Italy and Mediterranean FDSN Event service.
sources.display_name: Istituto Nazionale di Geofisica e Vulcanologia (INGV)

sources.name: ethz
sources.description: ETH Zurich Swiss Seismological Service FDSN Event service for Switzerland and the Alpine region.
sources.display_name: Swiss Seismological Service at ETH Zurich (SED)

sources.name: resif
sources.description: RESIF French and global M5+ FDSN Event service.

sources.name: ipgp
sources.description: IPGP Mayotte volcanic swarm FDSN Event service.
sources.display_name: Institut de Physique du Globe de Paris (IPGP)

sources.name: niep
sources.description: NIEP Romania and Vrancea FDSN Event service.

sources.name: usgs
sources.description: USGS Earthquake Hazards Program global earthquake catalog FDSN Event service.
sources.display_name: U.S. Geological Survey Earthquake Hazards Program (USGS)

sources.name: isc
sources.description: International Seismological Centre global FDSN Event service for the ISC bulletin and preliminary global catalog. Add 'isc' to FDSN_NODES to enable.
sources.coverage: Global ISC bulletin and preliminary catalog

sources.name: custom
sources.description: TEMPLATE - copy this entry, replace base_url with another FDSN Event service base URL, set node_id and metadata, then set enabled to true or select it with FDSN_NODES.
